title: Create: Randomize Filters
description: Lets you shuffle the road under your train tracks. Set up a filter to randomize blocks placed by your Deployer or Roller.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/i4TIZuLctiE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Create: Randomize Filters

Set your desired blocks you want to be randomly placed when you're on a train or a contraption.
You can either set a filter with equal chance of being placed, set a filter where you can set each blocks percentage chance of being placed, or set a sequence filter so the placed blocks will follow a set sequence pattern set by you.

This works on both Trains and Cart Contraptions, Deployer and Rollers.








I also have a Trowel mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/mech-trowel](https://modrinth.com/mod/mech-trowel)
